title: DeepResearcher: Scaling Reinforcement Learning for LLM-based Research Agents in Real-World Environments

defines.name: DeepResearcher
defines.definition: A reinforcement-learning framework for training LLM-based research agents to interact with live web search engines and perform iterative reasoning and evidence gathering in real-world environments.

problem: Existing prompt-engineered and RAG-based research agents are brittle and fail to capture the noise, heterogeneity, and dynamics of real-world web search.
